counts_verified.train_note: VERIFIED count is from lithology_competition/code/GIR/train.csv (a team subset = 28 wells, 342177 rows), NOT the official 98-well training set. The canonical 98-well train.csv is hosted on Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.4351156 and the xeek/thinkonward challenge page, which are not reachable from this build container. The 98 count must be verified by the ingester against the Zenodo release.
counts_verified.open_test_note: VERIFIED: 10 open leaderboard wells, matches handoff (98+10).
